content.full_text:
FaIn Polruc,u Pnacrrcps CouvrrssroN
P.O. Box 807 . .+2tt J Street . Sacramento. CA 95ttl2-0807
1916; irll-5660 . F-ax (916) ill-U886
October 3,2000
Robert J. Henry
General Counsel
School and College Legal Services
5350 Skylane Boulevard
Santa Rosa, CA 95403
Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 00-218
Dear Mr. Henry:
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the honoraria provisions of
the Political Reform Act (the "Act").r The Act requires the Commission to provide written
advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in question or to that perscn's authorized
representative. (Section 831la(b); Regulation 18329(bxl), enclosed.) Formal written advice is
the application of the law to a particular set of facts provided by the requestor and has the
purpose of conferring immunity on the requestor. (Section 83114@); Regulation 183290)(7).)
As such, the Commission does not respond to requests relating to past conduct. (Section
83 1 1a@); Regulation 18329(bX8XA).) The Commission may decline to provide informal
assistance in such a situation as well. (Section 831 1a@); Regulation 18329(c)@XA).)
Based on the facts included in your correspondence, we conclude that advice on your
question would necessarily relate to past conduct. Therefore, the Commission declines to issue
advice on this matter. However, our decision to decline to provide formal or informal advice is
not a determination that we have reached a conclusion regarding the question posed in your
request.
' Gor"-*"rrt Code sections 81000 - 91015. Commission regulations appear attitle 2,sections 18109 -
18996, of the California Code of Regulations.


File No. I-00-218
Page 2
For your information, we have enclosed the FPPC document entitled, "Limitations and
Restrictions on Gifts, Honoraria, Travel and Loans (A Fact Sheet for...Designated Employees of
Local Government Agencies)." We hope this information will be useful to you. If you have any
other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel
By:
Natalie
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
LM:NB jg
Enclosures
